title.en: Why Are Enterprise Clients Ghosting You? A Founder's First Lesson in AI Governance
title.zh: 為什麼企業客戶突然消失？新創創辦人的 AI 治理第一課

excerpt.en: Your AI feature is flawless, but the enterprise client demanded a 'Risk Assessment'? Here is how to overcome 'Black Box' anxiety and win their trust with a practical three-layer governance framework.
excerpt.zh: 你的 AI 功能無懈可擊，但企業客戶卻要求「風險評估報告」？學習如何用三層治理框架克服「黑盒子焦慮」，贏得他們的信任。

title.en: Beyond the Code: From 770 Resumes to AMD & Apple
title.zh: 超越程式碼：從 770 份履歷到 AMD 與 Apple

excerpt.en: A journey of dropping university prestige, reverse-engineering the job market, and using Interview-Prompted Learning to land top-tier infrastructure roles.
excerpt.zh: 一段放棄大學光環、逆向工程求職市場，並利用面試驅動學習來獲得頂級基礎設施工程師職位的旅程。

title.en: Architecting a Resilient AI API Gateway: Deep Dive into Distributed Rate Limiting
title.zh: 架構具備韌性的 AI API 網關：分散式限流系統深度解析

excerpt.en: A deep dive into building a production-grade AI API Gateway in Go, exploring dual-layer caching, Redis Lua atomic operations, and Fail-Open vs. Fail-Closed distributed strategies.
excerpt.zh: 深入探討如何用 Go 打造生產級別的 AI API 網關。解析雙層快取、Redis Lua 原子操作，以及 Fail-Open/Fail-Closed 的架構取捨。

title.en: Designing for the Surge: Architectural Trade-offs in Building a High-Concurrency Ticketing System
title.zh: 為了巨大流量而設計：打造高併發秒殺系統的架構取捨

excerpt.en: An inside look at the engineering decisions behind FlashForm, exploring asynchronous load leveling, Redis mutex locks, and event-driven architecture.
excerpt.zh: 深入剖析 FlashForm 高併發系統背後的工程決策。探討非同步削峰填谷、Redis 分散式鎖，以及事件驅動架構的技術取捨。

title.en: When the GUI Disappears: Google UCP and the Shift to Protocol-First Commerce
title.zh: 當 GUI 消失：Google UCP 與「協定優先」商務的典範轉移

excerpt.en: Deconstructing Google's UCP through architectural perspectives: API as a Product, Schema.org, and managing High Concurrency Reads without Walled Gardens.
excerpt.zh: 從架構師視角解構 Google UCP：API 即產品、語意化資料結構，以及無頭電商架構下的高併發讀取挑戰。

title.en: Backing Up My Brain Before the Army: Automating Blog Workflows
title.zh: 入伍前的腦袋備份：用 Python 與 AI 自動化發布工作流

excerpt.en: A realistic look at acting as the Architect to an AI Executor, fighting hallucinations to build a content pipeline 20 days before military enlistment.
excerpt.zh: 真實紀錄：以架構師身分與 AI 的幻覺搏鬥，在登入國軍 Online 前 20 天，打造出全自動的 Markdown 發布管線。
